stemHtml: Which situation would place the most significant physiological impact on a pilot’s body due to acceleration and G-forces?

options.a: Rapid acceleration on the runway followed by a 30-second hard pull generating strong G-forces.
options.b: Slow acceleration on the runway with the cabin fan on full blast.
options.c: Encountering occasional turbulence during cruise at high altitude.
options.d: Flying straight and level through light turbulence.
